overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, likely from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves from under a highway overpass along a rain-slicked sidewalk lined with digital billboards and neon signage, passing seated pedestrians and approaching a covered underpass. The scene is dominated by artificial neon lighting reflecting off wet pavement and futuristic architecture.

events.description: emerging from deep shadow of overpass into area with visible neon city lights ahead
slight right turn to follow sidewalk path along building facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward under the concrete overpass, moving toward the neon-lit cityscape visible ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the road to the right, headlights illuminating the wet pavement

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with yellow structural beams and dark shadowed underside
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and colorful neon signage visible in the distance
rain-slicked concrete pavement with yellow painted line reflecting ambient neon lights
multi-lane road with moving vehicle traffic separated by concrete barriers

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass in a futuristic city at night. The camera walks forward along a wet sidewalk, emerging from deep shadow to reveal a neon-lit skyline of skyscrapers ahead. Vehicles pass by on the road to the right as the camera makes a slight turn to follow the pedestrian path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising displays

events.description: pedestrian walks toward camera from opposite direction and passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk next to a building with large illuminated NEW LOOK signage, passing seated individuals

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing and green pants walking toward camera, passing by on the left side

entered.detail: large dark building with prominent red neon NEW LOOK signage and yellow safety railings along the edge
yellow metal barriers separating the sidewalk from the road below, running along the building edge
illuminated advertising screens displaying various cyberpunk-style product advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beside a building with prominent NEW LOOK signage, the camera passes yellow safety railings on the right and digital billboards on the left. The wet pavement continues to reflect the red neon glow from the building signage. A pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction, and a few people are seated on benches near the billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with dense digital advertising

events.description: entering the covered underpass tunnel with illuminated billboards lining the walls

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a covered underpass area, passing a seated individual with red hair near the advertising displays

notable_agents.action: person with bright red hair sitting on a concrete bench next to a digital advertising billboard

entered.detail: illuminated underpass entrance with overhead fluorescent lighting and dark tunnel depth beyond
built-in concrete seating areas where pedestrians are resting near the billboards

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and enters a covered underpass tunnel lined with bright digital billboards on the left wall. A person with red hair sits on a concrete bench near the advertisements. The environment becomes more enclosed as the camera moves deeper into the underpass, with the tunnel entrance receding behind and the illuminated depth ahead becoming the focal point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the oppressive shadow of a highway overpass into the vibrant, enclosed glow of a neon-lit urban underpass. It begins beneath a massive concrete structure, moving forward along a rain-slicked sidewalk as the camera emerges from deep shadow to reveal a towering skyline of futuristic skyscrapers. As the camera follows the pedestrian path, the scene shifts toward a building marked by prominent NEW LOOK signage, where red neon light reflects off the wet pavement and digital billboards line the way past seated pedestrians. The environment then becomes increasingly enclosed as the camera approaches and enters a covered underpass tunnel. Finally, the open city skyline recedes behind the viewer, leaving the camera to move deeper into the tunnel toward a focal point of bright advertisements and concrete benches.
